name: Ethanol
plain_summary: Common spectroscopic solvent. Essentially transparent through most of the near-UV; teaching focus is solvent cutoff, not a chromophore band.

abs.plain_caption: Schematic deep-UV edge / cutoff teaching curve — ethanol is UV-transparent above ~210–220 nm for most work.
abs.lit: Teaching solvent-cutoff schematic (not a chromophore SI). Practical UV cutoff for ethanol is often listed near ~205–210 nm.
